Amid confusion over internal reservation, Karnataka SC/ST commission holds deliberations
articles.description: Amid confusion over the internal reservation among Scheduled Castes, and reduction of overall reservation to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes from 56% to 50% for recruitment to 56,432 posts, the Karnataka State Commission for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes held deliberations with senior officials, former KPSC functionaries, and community representatives

topStories.title: Over 200 signatories seek Rahul Gandhi’s apology for conduct within Parliament complex

topStories.title: US visa April 2026 bulletin released: Check key updates on EB-1 to EB-5 categories, and family visa caps
topStories.description: Family-sponsored visas are capped at 226,000 and employment-based visas at a minimum of 140,000 annually, with per-country limits in place.

topStories.title: 'Will Work Together For Restoration Of Peace': PM Speaks To UAE President
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke to UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, discussed with him the current situation in West Asia and agreed on ensuring safe and free navigation...

topStories.title: Trump slams Joe Kent over remarks on Iran war; says ‘If I hadn’t ended Obama's deal, nuclear war would have happened'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump responded to Joe Kent's resignation, calling him ‘very weak on security.' Kent resigned earlier today after he accused Israel of deceiving Trump into believing that Tehran was a threat.

topStories.title: Explosive claims by Trump's ex-counterterrorism official Joe Kent: 'Israel deceived Trump into believing...'
topStories.description: Joe Kent, Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, resigned from his post on Tuesday. In a post shared on X, Kent said that Iran posed no imminent threat, adding that the US President has been deceived by Israeli officials. He urged Trump to reverse the course and save American lives.

topStories.title: Trump Slams Joe Kent, Says It's 'Good' He Resigned After Downplaying Iran Threat
topStories.description: The US President added that while he found Kent to be "a nice guy," he had concerns about his stance on national security.

topStories.title: Trump faces global snub amid conflict with Iran: Spain says no to bases, allies reject Hormuz showdown
topStories.description: From Spain rejecting Trump's request to use jointly operated military bases on its territory to attack Iran to multiple Washington allies rejecting his call to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz – almost everyone has denied joining the war

topStories.title: Day after NDA’s clean sweep in Bihar, Congress MLA says skipped RS poll on State party’s chief’s advice; Rajesh Ram denies claim
topStories.description: The Mahagathbandhan joint candidate, Amarendra Dhari Singh, lost the biennial election to the Upper House of Parliament after four MLAs from the Opposition alliance refrained from voting on March 16

topStories.description: NIA examining digital footprints of accused; in social media post, accused U.S. citizen allegedly claims to run covert operations against authoritarian regimes; Ukraine Embassy seeks consular access to accused

dailyNews.title: St. Patrick’s Day 2026 in US: What’s open, what’s closed, and key details
dailyNews.description: St. Patrick’s Day dates back to the 17th century when it was established as a religious feast day.

dailyNews.title: Israel, US first be ‘brought to their knees’: Mojtaba Khamenei on ‘right time for peace’ as Iran's Larijani gets killed
dailyNews.description: Israel announced the elimination of Iran's security chief Ali Larijan. An Iranian official revealed that new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei rejected proposals to ease tensions, insisting the US and Israel must first be subdued before any peace talks.

dailyNews.title: Who is Joe Kent? Trump's counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war - ‘Tehran posed no threat’
dailyNews.description: Top counterterrorism official Joe Kent resigns over Trump's Iran war, says Iran posed 'no imminent threat to our nation',

dailyNews.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
dailyNews.description: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: 'This is not Europe's war'—EU nations rebuff Trump's call to send warships to Hormuz Strait
dailyNews.description: Europe has made it clear that it is not going to engage in the US and Israel's war in Iran, adding that Americans chose this path. Luxembourg's Deputy Minister went a step further with his rebuke of Donald Trump, stating that they will not be ‘blackmailed’ by Washington.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Delta Air Lines lifts revenue outlook despite jet fuel hit, shares jump 4%
dailyNews.description: Delta Air Lines raised its first-quarter revenue forecast in light of robust travel demand, offsetting a hit from spiking jet fuel costs due to the Middle East war.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Qualcomm unveils $20 billion stock buyback program; shares jump 3%
dailyNews.description: Smartphone ​chip designer Qualcomm on Tuesday unveiled a $20 ​billion stock buyback program as it looks to take advantage of a steep drop in its share price, ‌which ⁠has been ⁠hit by a global memory supply crunch ​that is expected to slow handset manufacturing.

dailyNews.title: Cuba could experience freedom for 'first time in 70 years' within weeks, former Trump official predicts

dailyNews.title: Trump bids goodbye to intel official who resigned over Iran: 'Good thing that he's out'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said Joe Kent's resignation is "a good thing" because he was "weak on security."

dailyNews.title: Joe Kent, a Top Counterterrorism Official for the Trump Administration, Resigns, Citing Iran War
dailyNews.description: Mr. Kent is the highest-ranking Trump administration official to quit in opposition to the conflict. He said pressure from Israel had pushed the president into war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: What’s in Trump’s SAVE Act, the Voter ID Bill Republicans Are Pushing?
dailyNews.description: The legislation would require voters to prove their citizenship in person upon registration, ban IDs without a photo at polling places and criminalize failures to enforce such requirements.

dailyNews.title: Democrats Hammer Trump on ‘Energy Affordability’
dailyNews.description: A new Senate report argues the Trump administration has also pushed costs up by stifling clean energy.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Gutting of Election Security Fuels Worries for Midterms
dailyNews.description: Officials say the crippling of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, which the president himself created, could open elections to cyberattacks and foreign influence.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signals He May Intervene in Cuba Following Iran and Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Still at war with Iran and in control in Venezuela, President Trump is signaling that he is about to intervene in another country.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Dangerous Lack of a Strategy in Iran
dailyNews.description: The early reality of the Iran war is not cooperating with the president’s bluster.
